Configuration

Fee Structure

Define the fee once per class (e.g. Class V). Every section of that class (A, B, C…) automatically inherits the same structure — including admission, registration, tuition and any other components. When you later create a section, the fee id is linked in the background.

Fees

Generate Monthly Demands

Demands will be generated only for {{ vm.studentName(vm.genSelectedStudent) }}.

Billing cycle decides how many months each demand covers — a quarterly demand bills 3 months of recurring fees, half-yearly 6, yearly 12. One-time items (like admission) bill only once.
